# The Perfect Cup of Faith

## Scripture

"For we live by faith, not by sight." - 2 Corinthians 5:7

## Reflection

Just as a skilled barista carefully measures, grinds, and brews the perfect cup of coffee, so too must we attend to the nuances of our faith. We must carefully cultivate our trust in God's goodness and sovereignty, even when the world around us seems uncertain. Just as the roasting process brings out the unique flavors and aromas of the coffee beans, so too does the process of suffering refine our faith and reveal its depth. As we pour our hearts out to God in prayer, may we find that our trust in Him is the crema that crowns our lives with joy and peace.

## Prayer

We ask that You would help us to cultivate a deeper trust in Your goodness and sovereignty, even in the midst of uncertainty. Give us the eyes to see You at work in our lives and the hearts to trust in Your perfect plan.

## One-Line Application
May our faith be refined like a rich cup of coffee through the trials and struggles of life.
